error.signature: MoveIt failed to compute a plan to the goal state

verdict.summary: MoveIt2 motion planner cannot find a collision-free path. Caused by tight spaces, IK failures, or planning scene misconfiguration.

dead_ends.action: Increase planning time to 60+ seconds unconditionally
dead_ends.why_fails: If the goal is unreachable or in collision, no amount of planning time will help

dead_ends.action: Disable collision checking to get a plan
dead_ends.why_fails: Produces paths that collide with obstacles or the robot itself; dangerous on real hardware

dead_ends.action: Switch planner to RRTConnect for every motion
dead_ends.why_fails: RRTConnect is already the default; the issue is usually the goal or scene, not the planner

workarounds.action: Check if goal pose is reachable with IK: computeIK before planning
Visualize the planning scene in RViz to check for unexpected collision objects
workarounds.how: Add PlanningScene display in RViz2; check for stale collision objects

workarounds.action: Use cartesian path planning for constrained motions

preceded_by.condition: Missing TF frames cause MoveIt to fail at IK stage
Invalid URDF breaks MoveIt's robot model
